name: components/slider
description: A draggable numeric input that lets users select a value from a continuous range. Provides a complete composition system with Slider, SliderTrack, SliderFill, SliderThumb, SliderGroup, SliderLabel, SliderValueLabel, SliderDescription, and SliderErrorMessage. Supports both horizontal and vertical orientations, disabled states, and invalid states. Built on Kobalte Slider with full ARIA value-text support and keyboard arrow/page navigation.
useCases: Volume or brightness controls in media players and image editors
Price range filters on e-commerce search pages with min/max thumbs
Rating or satisfaction score inputs where a numeric value maps to a label
Zoom level or timeline scrubbers in map and video applications
usage: import { Slider, SliderTrack, SliderFill, SliderThumb, SliderGroup, SliderLabel, SliderValueLabel, SliderDescription, SliderErrorMessage } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/slider"
